sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n50457" key="i(matiopwliko/n" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἱμᾰτιο-πωλικόν</orth> (sc. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τέλος</foreign>), <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n50457.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">tax on clothes-dealers, PLeipz.</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:5:7" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.7</biblScope> </bibl> (<tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Ber.Sächs.Ges.d.W.</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:37:245" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">37.245</biblScope> </bibl> <date TEIform="date">(iii A.D.)</date>).</sense> </entryFree>
